properties.entry: SELECT user_id, role FROM users WHERE user_id = ? AND password = ?
SELECT facility_id, facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time FROM hotel_facility ORDER BY facility_id
UPDATE hotel_facility SET facility_name = ?, facility_type = ?, location = ?, open_time = ?, description = ? WHERE facility_id = ?
SELECT image_path FROM facility_image WHERE image_id = ?
DELETE FROM facility_image WHERE image_id = ?
INSERT INTO facility_image (facility_id, image_path, is_main) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main = 'N' WHERE facility_id = ?
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main = 'Y' WHERE image_id = ?
SELECT facility_id, facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time, description FROM hotel_facility WHERE facility_id = ?
SELECT image_id, image_path, is_main FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id = ?
INSERT INTO hotel_facility (facility_type, facility_name, location, open_time, description) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?)
DELETE FROM hotel_facility WHERE facility_id = ?
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main = 'Y' WHERE image_id = ( SELECT image_id FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id = ? ORDER BY image_id DESC LIMIT 1 )
UPDATE facility_image SET is_main='Y' WHERE image_id = ( SELECT image_id FROM ( SELECT image_id FROM facility_image WHERE facility_id = ? ORDER BY image_id DESC LIMIT ?,1 ) AS tmp )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hotel_facility
SELECT * FROM hotel_facility ORDER BY facility_id DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT * FROM room_manage
UPDATE room_manage SET room_name = ?, capacity = ?, room_location = ?, room_description = ?, usage_time =?, amenity = ?, minibar = ?, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = ?
DELETE FROM room_manage WHERE room_id = ?
DELETE FROM room_image WHERE room_id = ?
INSERT INTO room_manage(room_name, capacity, room_location, room_description, usage_time,amenity,minibar,created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?,?,?,?, NOW())
INSERT INTO room_image (room_id, image_path, is_main, display_order, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, NOW())
SELECT * FROM room_manage ORDER BY room_id DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT * FROM room_manage WHERE room_id = ?
SELECT * FROM room_image WHERE room_id = ?
UPDATE room_image SET is_main = CASE WHEN image_no = ? THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE room_id = ?
DELETE FROM room_image WHERE image_no = ?
SELECT image_path FROM room_image WHERE image_no = ?
DELETE FROM room_image WHERE image_path = ?
SELECT * FROM qna ORDER BY qna_no LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna
SELECT qna_no, user_id, title, content, answer, status, view_count, reg_date, answer_date FROM qna WHERE qna_no = ?
UPDATE qna SET answer = ?, answer_date = NOW(), status = 'ANSWERED' WHERE qna_no = ?
DELETE FROM qna WHERE qna_no = ?
SELECT qna_no, user_id, title, status, view_count, reg_date FROM qna WHERE status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY qna_no DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE status = 'WAITING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM faq
SELECT * FROM faq ORDER BY sort_order ASC, faq_no DESC LIMIT ?, ?
INSERT INTO faq (category, question, answer, sort_order, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT * FROM faq WHERE faq_no = ?
UPDATE faq SET category = ?, question = ?, answer = ?, sort_order = ?, status = ? WHERE faq_no = ?
DELETE FROM faq WHERE faq_no = ?
SELECT * FROM reservation ORDER BY reservation_id WHERE status = '1'
SELECT * FROM reservation ORDER BY reservation_id LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT * FROM reservation ORDER BY reservation_id
UPDATE reservation SET status = '2' WHERE reservation_id = ?
UPDATE reservation SET status = '4' WHERE reservation_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status != 4
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE status != '4' ORDER BY reservation_id DESC LIMIT ?,?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation
SELECT * FROM room ORDER BY room_id
SELECT * FROM room WHERE room_id = ?
UPDATE room SET base_capacity = ?, max_capacity = ?, base_price = ?, extra_charge = ? WHERE room_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room
SELECT * FROM room ORDER BY room_id DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE check_in = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE check_out = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN check_in AND check_out AND status = '2'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = '3'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE status = 'WAITING'
SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY user_id
SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY user_id LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
SELECT user_id, email, name, phone, role, status FROM users WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE users SET name = ?, email = ?, phone = ?, role = ?, status = ? WHERE user_id = ?
UPDATE users SET status = '3' WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, rm.room_name, r.check_in, r.status FROM reservation r JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.room_id ORDER BY r.reservation_id DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT qna_no, user_id, title, status FROM qna ORDER BY qna_no DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(check_in,'%m-%d') day, COUNT(*) count FROM reservation WHERE check_in >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY day
SELECT rm.room_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation r JOIN room rm ON r.room_id = rm.room_id WHERE r.status = '2' GROUP BY rm.room_name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_manage
